prestazioni: Upgrade to a **Garrett GTX4202R turbocharger** (hybrid billet wheel) for the **4.2L V8 FSI (CGRA)** engine, paired with a **Precision Turbo & Engine 46mm wastegate** and **Silicone Intake Hoses by Vibrant Performance** to handle increased boost (target: 1.2 bar / 17.4 psi) while maintaining OEM-like drivability. Requires a **custom ECU flash via Alientech KESS3** with a **Motec M150 standalone ECU** for full flex-fuel (E85) compatibility and **Bosch Motorsport 0280158862 injectors** (1,200cc/min) to support 650+ HP at the crank.

Install a **Wagner Tuning Competition Intercooler Kit (Audi A8 D4 4.2 V8 FSI)** with a **50mm core thickness** and **aluminum end tanks** to reduce intake temps by 40°C under full load, paired with a **Forge Motorsport Catch Can (dual-stage, 500ml capacity)** to prevent oil buildup in the intake tract. Replace the OEM fuel pump with a **Walbro 450 LPH E85-compatible pump** and add a **Radium Engineering Fuel Pressure Regulator** for stable fuel delivery under high boost.

Swap the OEM **ZF 8HP70 8-speed transmission** for a **ZF 8HP90X (high-performance variant)** with a **VALEO 400Nm torque converter** and **custom TCU tuning via HP Tuners** to handle the increased power. Reinforce the drivetrain with a **034 Motorsport Differential Mount Insert (80A durometer)** and **Peloquin LSD (40% lockup)** for the rear axle. Upgrade the driveshaft to a **GKN Driveline carbon-fiber unit** and install **AP Racing CP8860 front brake calipers** with **380mm two-piece rotors** and **Ferodo DS2500 pads** for consistent stopping power.
estetica: Install a **Prior Design PD8XX widebody kit** (D4-specific, bolt-on) with **custom carbon-fiber fender flares** (30mm wider front, 40mm wider rear) to accommodate **OZ Racing Ultraleggera HLT 20x9.5 ET35 (front) and 20x11 ET45 (rear)** wheels wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (265/30/20 front, 295/25/20 rear)**. The kit includes a **carbon-fiber front splitter with integrated canards** and a **rear diffuser with dual 100mm exhaust outlets** for the **Akrapović Evolution Line Titanium exhaust system (4.2 V8 FSI-specific)**.

Replace the OEM headlights with **Hella Dynamic LED Projector Headlights (D4-compatible, adaptive)** featuring **Osram Night Breaker Laser bulbs** and **custom LED angel eyes (Lux H8 V4, 6000K)**. Add **Morimoto XB LED fog lights** with **custom smoked housings** and a **VLAND Sequential LED Tail Lights (D4-specific, plug-and-play)** with **dynamic turn signals**. The front grille is replaced with a **carbon-fiber RS7-style grille (D4-specific, mesh design)** and **blacked-out Audi rings (debadged)** for a stealth look.

Lower the car with **KW Suspension Clubsport Coilovers (3-way adjustable, D4-specific)** set to a **30mm drop (front) and 25mm drop (rear)** with **Eibach Pro-Spacer 20mm wheel spacers (hub-centric, 5x112)** to fill the arches. Add **034 Motorsport Front Sway Bar (25mm, adjustable)** and **Hotchkis Rear Sway Bar (22mm)** to reduce body roll. The exterior is finished with a **full 3M Matte Graphite Wrap (Satin finish, 2080 series)** and **custom gloss black roof** (vinyl, 3M 1080 series) for contrast. Interior upgrades include **Recaro Sportster CS seats (D4-compatible, carbon-fiber backs)** with **Schroth Profi II 4-point harnesses** and a **MOMO Mod.78 carbon-fiber steering wheel (D4 airbag-compatible)**.
